name: QA 1139
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1139

Ranking, sorting, limit filter, and predicates tests with pmrep.



Copyright (c) 2018-2019 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2604-container reproduce

Ranking, sorting, limit filter, and predicates tests with pmrep.

Copyright (c) 2018-2019 Red Hat.
